---
name: Bug report
about: Report a focused, reproducible bug
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description
Describe the problem clearly and briefly.

## Expected Behavior
Explain what should happen.

## Actual Behavior
Explain what happens instead.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to ...
2. Do ...
3. Observe ...

## Scope
List the specific bug fix work that should be included.

## Out of Scope
List related changes or improvements that should not be included.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The bug is fixed for the described reproduction path.
- [ ] Existing behavior outside the scope is unchanged.
- [ ] No unrelated files are modified.

## Test Plan
Describe the checks needed to verify the fix, including regression coverage when available.

## Notes for AI
- Read AGENTS.md first
- Keep changes small and issue-driven
- Do not modify unrelated files
- Do not create extra markdown files
- Do not commit secrets or .env files
